message:
🌱 Add cross-project navigation links

Each project now has a "Related Projects" section linking to all other projects:
- A2A → KubeStellar, KubeFlex, Multi Plugin
- KubeFlex → KubeStellar, A2A, Multi Plugin
- Multi Plugin → KubeStellar, A2A, KubeFlex
- KubeStellar → A2A, KubeFlex, Multi Plugin
